listItem(address,uint256,uint256).details: Caller must have called `approve(marketplace, tokenId)` or      `setApprovalForAll(marketplace, true)` on the NFT contract first.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

buyItem(address,uint256).notice: Buy a listed NFT by sending exactly the listing price in ETH.

cancelListing(address,uint256).notice: Cancel an active listing you created.

listItem(address,uint256,uint256).notice: List an NFT you own for sale at a fixed price.

setFeeBps(uint256).notice: Owner can adjust the marketplace fee (capped at MAX_FEE_BPS).

setFeeRecipient(address).notice: Owner can update where fees are sent.

updateListingPrice(address,uint256,uint2.notice: Update the price of an active listing you created.
